headline: Iron Mountain Named 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year, Business Applications: Media & Entertainment
summary: PORTSMOUTH, N.H., April 21, 2026--Iron Mountain has been named 2026 Google Cloud Partner of the Year, Business Applications: Media & Entertainment.

headline: Why The Narrative Around Iron Mountain (IRM) Is Shifting On Subtle Valuation And Guidance Updates
summary: The latest update leaves Iron Mountain’s internal fair value almost unchanged, trimming it by about $0.09 from $122.82 to $122.73. That tiny move sits alongside external analysts holding to a $127 price target and an Overweight rating, indicating that recent model tweaks are more about fine tuning than rethinking the story. Read on to see what is driving these views and how you can track the evolving analyst narrative around the stock. Analyst Price Targets don't always capture the full...

headline: Iron Mountain Earnings Preview: What to Expect
summary: Iron Mountain will release its first-quarter earnings later this month, and analysts anticipate a triple-digit FFO growth.

headline: Wells Fargo Maintains Overweight on Iron Mountain, Raises Price Target to $135
summary: Wells Fargo  analyst Eric Luebchow   maintains Iron Mountain (NYSE:IRM) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $125 to $135.
